trends.name: US-Iran War
trends.summary: US struck Iran in Operation Epic Fury, devastating Iran's navy and missile infrastructure. Strait of Hormuz briefly closed, now reopened. Trump signaling war could end 'very soon.' Iran named Mojtaba Khamenei as new Supreme Leader after his father was killed in strikes. French carrier en route. 7th US service member killed identified.

trends.name: Oil Price Shock
trends.summary: Oil surged to nearly $120/bbl at peak war panic before plunging back below $90 as Trump signaled peace. G7 discussing emergency reserve release but no action yet. Stagflation fears rising. Treasury yields pulled back. US stocks erased early losses and rose on Trump comments.

trends.name: Mojtaba Khamenei
trends.summary: Iran's new Supreme Leader is Mojtaba Khamenei, 56, son of the late Ayatollah killed in US/Israeli strikes. Never held elected office, never given a public speech, lived in shadows. Iranians rallying around him. France redirecting nuclear carrier to the region.

trends.name: Anthropic vs. Pentagon
trends.summary: Anthropic is suing the Pentagon after being labeled a 'supply chain risk' — a designation that could cost billions in revenue. White House reportedly readying executive order to 'weed out' Anthropic. Experts worry about impact on AI in national security.

trends.name: G7 Emergency Oil Reserves
trends.summary: G7 nations say they 'stand ready' to release emergency oil reserves to cool prices triggered by the Iran war. Broad agreement not to release yet, but discussions ongoing. US also weighing easing Russian oil sanctions as a pressure valve.

trends.name: France Naval Force
trends.summary: France is sending a large naval force including its nuclear-powered aircraft carrier to the Middle East, marking a significant European military escalation in the Iran conflict.

trends.name: Stagflation / Rate Cuts Reversed
trends.summary: Investors are unwinding bets on Fed rate cuts as the oil shock raises inflation fears. El-Erian warns stagflationary forces are building. Treasury yields initially surged then pulled back on Trump peace signals. February jobs report showed -92K, adding to macro concern.

trends.name: US Jobs Drop
trends.summary: US economy shed 92,000 jobs in February in a sharp slide, adding to concerns about the economic impact of the Iran war and oil shock.

trends.name: Trump Policy Moves
trends.summary: Trump announced sanctions relief to ease oil prices; pushing 'Shield of the Americas' Latin America military coalition; family-linked group probed over Chinese stock scams; threatening Republicans with midterm message disruption.

trends.name: Alexander Brothers Verdict
trends.summary: Top New York real estate brokers Oren and Alon Alexander found guilty on all counts in sex-trafficking trial.

trends.name: ISIS NYC Attack
trends.summary: Two men charged with terrorism after throwing homemade bombs at anti-Islam protesters outside Gracie Mansion in NYC. Cited ISIS as inspiration.

trends.name: AI / Tech News
trends.summary: OpenAI acquiring cybersecurity startup Promptfoo; Bluesky CEO stepping back; Sandberg and Clegg joining Nvidia-backed Nscale; Google DeepMind CEO warns AI investment looks 'bubble-like'.
